results.rendered_html:
vivakṣita a.
1 Intended to be said or spoken; vivakṣitaṃ hyanuktamanutāpaṃ janayati  Ś. 3. 
2 Meant, intended, purposed.
3 Wished, desired.
4 Favourite.
— taṃ
1 Purpose, intention.
2 Sense, meaning.
